-4.title: EXIT
-4.text: Exit button pressed 3x in a row, closing gui

-1.title: INSTRUMENT ERROR
-1.text: Power cycle the instrument, if error persists contact Arete Biosciences

0.title: INITIALIZING
0.text: Please wait for instrument to complete initialization

1.title: READY TO RUN
1.text: Select profile then select "Run" to start

2.title: TEST IN PROGRESS
2.text: Please wait for instrument to complete

3.title: TEST COMPLETE
3.text: Remove samples. Select "Next Run" to run again.

4.title: READY TO RUN
4.text: No profile selected. Try again then press "Run" to start

5.title: Run_assay.py not configured to loop back yet
5.text: to rerun use cmdline to run run_assay.py
